prompt:
Create a journey map from this data:

Phase: Discovery
- Steps: Google Search, Read Reviews, Visit Website
- Emotion: 0.5, 0.6, 0.7
- Pain: Too many options, hard to trust reviews
- Opportunity: Add comparison tool

Phase: Evaluation
- Steps: Free Trial, Demo Call, Internal Discussion
- Emotion: 0.8, 0.7, 0.4
- Pain: Trial too short, demo scheduling friction
- Opportunity: Extend trial, self-serve demo

Phase: Purchase
- Steps: Procurement, Contract, Payment
- Emotion: 0.3, 0.2, 0.5
- Pain: Complex procurement process, legal review delays
- Opportunity: Streamline contract templates

Phase: Implementation
- Steps: Setup, Training, Go-Live
- Emotion: 0.6, 0.7, 0.9
- Pain: Integration complexity
- Opportunity: Pre-built integrations
